layout_and_spacing.bento_grid: grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-8 lg:grid-cols-12 gap-6 lg:gap-8

buttons.primary: bg-[#2D4A3E] text-white hover:bg-[#1E332A] transition-colors rounded-xl font-medium px-6 py-3
buttons.voice_cta: bg-[#E57A5D] text-white hover:bg-[#D1664A] transition-colors rounded-full shadow-lg flex items-center justify-center p-6
buttons.secondary: bg-stone-100 text-stone-800 hover:bg-stone-200 border border-stone-200 transition-colors rounded-xl font-medium px-6 py-3

cards.routine_note: bg-white border-l-4 border-l-[#3A5A40] border-y border-r border-stone-200 p-6 rounded-xl
cards.safeguarding_incident: bg-white border-l-4 border-l-[#B23A48] border-y border-r border-stone-200 p-6 rounded-xl

components.inputs: bg-white border border-stone-200 rounded-lg px-4 py-3 text-stone-800 focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-[#2D4A3E] focus:border-transparent

badges.urgent: bg-[#B23A48]/10 text-[#B23A48] px-3 py-1 rounded-full text-xs font-bold uppercase tracking-wider
badges.routine: bg-[#3A5A40]/10 text-[#3A5A40] px-3 py-1 rounded-full text-xs font-bold uppercase tracking-wider

accessibility_and_testing.contrast: Ensure all text meets at least 4.5:1 ratio against backgrounds. Use dark stone text on light backgrounds.
accessibility_and_testing.testing_attributes: All interactive elements MUST include data-testid (e.g., data-testid='voice-record-btn').
accessibility_and_testing.focus_states: Visible focus rings on all inputs and buttons: focus:ring-2 focus:ring-offset-2 focus:ring-[#2D4A3E].

instructions_to_main_agent: Use Manrope for headings and DM Sans for body text. Install these via Google Fonts if necessary.
The app has two primary user modes: Mobile Staff Input (needs large touch targets, prominent voice CTA) and Manager Dashboard (needs data density and clear incident triaging).
Implement the Voice CTA as a large, floating or highly prominent circular button, colored in the accent Terracotta (#E57A5D) to ensure it's always accessible for staff on the move.
Visually differentiate Routine Notes from Safeguarding Incidents. Use left-border color coding (Green vs Red/Terracotta) on cards to quickly highlight severity without overwhelming the UI.
Do NOT use generic SaaS purples or blues. Stick strictly to the Organic & Earthy palette (Stone, Forest Green, Terracotta) to evoke calm, trust, and professionalism.
Ensure all lists, tables, and cards use generous padding (p-4 or p-6) to improve readability.
Avoid glassmorphism for this app; use flat solid surfaces with subtle 1px borders to maintain clarity and a grounded feel.
